title: Evansia nantouensis

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it a promising natural remedy for various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Evansia nantouensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are thought to contribute to its therapeutic effects. Evansia nantouensis is commonly used to make herbal teas, extracts, and infusions, which are used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections.
